headline: Search captures high-intent demand; impression share losses on core brand terms need budget or bid attention.

recommendations.title: Defend core brand terms before competitor conquest ramps
recommendations.rationale: IS dropped 5pts while CPC on generics rose; brand terms still highest ROAS.

recommendations.title: refresh top-fatigued creatives in retargeting
recommendations.rationale: Duplicate hygiene check: different channel but same theme as social — merge test.

evidence: Search query report: +18% brand term volume WoW.
